name: chrome-companion
description: A draggable pixel-art companion character Chrome extension

scripts.build: esbuild src/content.js --bundle --outfile=dist/content.js && esbuild src/background/service-worker.js --bundle --outfile=dist/background.js && esbuild options/options.js --bundle --outfile=dist/options.js
scripts.dev: npm run build && (esbuild src/content.js --bundle --outfile=dist/content.js --watch & esbuild src/background/service-worker.js --bundle --outfile=dist/background.js --watch & esbuild options/options.js --bundle --outfile=dist/options.js --watch)
